intents.text: Ask whether radix was fully removed from the project.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Did we not remove radix entirely?

intents.text: Verify that all radix dependencies and usage have been completely purged.
Ask if base-ui.com offers a component that could replace cmdk.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: sure there's nothing in https://base-ui.com/ for cmdk?

intents.text: Ask what benefit using a base-ui replacement for cmdk would provide.
